ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANT CUPERTINO ELECTRIC, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT CUPERTINO ELECTRIC, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DID NOT SATISFY ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT POSSESS AND CANNOT REASONABLY OBTAIN EVIDENCE THAT HE WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS ATTRIBUTABLE TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY PRECLUDES DEFENDANT'S RELIANCE ON THE FACTUALLY DEVOID PRONG OF AGUILAR. EVEN IF DEFENDANT HAD SUSTAINED ITS BURDEN, PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION AND DECLARATION CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE WHETHER HE WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS-CONTAINING FIREPROOFING ATTRIBUTABLE TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANT CAHILL CONTRACTORS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT CAHILL CONTRACTORS INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DID NOT SATISFY ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT POSSESS AND CANNOT REASONABLY OBTAIN EVIDENCE THAT HE WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS ATTRIBUTABLE TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY PRECLUDES DEFENDANT'S RELIANCE ON THE FACTUALLY DEVOID PRONG OF AGUILAR. EVEN IF DEFENDANT HAD SUSTAINED ITS BURDEN, PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION AND DECLARATION CREATE A TRIABLE ISSUE WHETHER HE WAS EXPOSED TO ASBESTOS-CONTAINING FIREPROOFING ATTRIBUTABLE TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jasun C. Molinelli, Esq. of ARCHER NORRIS (925-930-6600), appearing for defendant / moving party Cupertino Electric, Inc.
Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party James D. Lewis

RULING:
Defendant Cupertino Electric, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Cupertino Electric, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos attributable to defendant. Plaintiff's deposition testimony precludes defendant's reliance on the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Even if defendant had sustained its burden, plaintiff's deposition and declaration create a triable issue whether he was exposed to asbestos-containing fireproofing attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to plaintiff's declaration are overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)

Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party James D. Lewis

RULING:
DEFENDANT SCOTT CO. OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Scott Co. of California's motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiff does not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that he was exposed to asbestos attributable to defendant. Because defendant did not explore the answer given by plaintiff in his deposition at lines 15 and 16 of page 663, the court cannot say that plaintiff has no evidence regarding asbestos content of the fireproofing that he says he was exposed to at Stanford. Even if defendant had satisfied its burden of production, plaintiff's declaration creates a triable issue whether he was exposed to asbestos attributable to defendant. The objections to plaintiff's declaration are overruled. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
